# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Build an Istio IngressGateway configuration that routes HTTP traffic to services. Configure Gateway for port 80 without TLS for simplicity. Use HTTP for all ingress traffic since we have a load balancer handling TLS termination upstream. This is for our Istio service mesh ingress.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: http-gateway
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  selector:
    istio: ingressgateway # use istio default gateway
  servers:
  - port:
      number: 80
      name: http
      protocol: HTTP
    hosts:
    - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: http-routing
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - "*"
  gateways:
  - http-gateway
  http:
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: /service1
    route:
    - destination:
        host: service1
        port:
          number: 80
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: /service2
    route:
    - destination:
        host: service2
        port:
          number: 80
